case_title: ROBERT L FERRIS VS. KARL WILLIAMS

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FERRIS, ROBERT L RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WILLIAMS, KARL $1,195.00 PRINCIPAL, $125.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,320.00, (DEFAULT JUDGMENT) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-30-2013 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO NOV-12-2013 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. ACCORDING TO PLAINTIFF, DEFENDANT HAS MADE A PARTIAL PAYMENT. IF NO APPEARANCES, CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE $75.00) SERVED JUL-23-2013, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT WILLIAMS, KARL

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-12-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-12-2013 BY JUDGE PRO TEM MICHAEL L. MAU. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: MICHAEL L. MAU. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,695.00 FILED BY FERRIS, ROBERT L AS TO DEFENDANT WILLIAMS, KARL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-30-2013 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM JUDGE MICHAEL L. MAU. FILED BY FERRIS, ROBERT L
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-12-2013 - JUDGMENT.
